basic_details.job_title: IIM Kozhikode Junior Library Professional Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode (IIM Kozhikode) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode has released the official notification for 3 Junior Library Professional Assistant posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Kerala. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxation will be applicable as per the rules.

qualification.details: Master of Library & Information Science (MLISc) from a recognized university with First Class (completed within last three years: 2022, 2023, or 2024). Minimum one to two years of relevant post-qualification experience in a reputed institute (IIM, IIT, NIT, IISER, etc.). Strong proficiency in English communication. Desirable: B.Com/Management, NET/SLET, publication, KOHA knowledge.

selection_process: Screening of Applications Skill Test Presentation Interview
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Library Professional Assistant post at IIM Kozhikode?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Junior Library Professional Assistant position at IIM Kozhikode is 10th May 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Library Professional Assistant role?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Junior Library Professional Assistant position at the Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required educational qualification for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master of Library & Information Science (MLISc) from a recognized university with First Class, completed between 2022 and 2024. Relevant experience is also required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Library Professional Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Junior Library Professional Assistant post is 30 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Library Professional Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Junior Library Professional Assistant position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 28,300/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the Junior Library Professional Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the notification, there is no application fee mentioned for General/OBC categories. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any specific details.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves screening of applications, followed by a skill test, presentation, and a final interview to assess the suitability of the candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The job type for the Junior Library Professional Assistant position at IIM Kozhikode is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Kerala apply for this post?
faq.answer: The notification indicates applications are invited from eligible candidates in Kerala. It is advisable to check the official notification for detailed eligibility regarding domicile or location.
